summary: Southern Abrasives is an active deal in proposal review with commercial potential, but announcement and delivery readiness are not yet established.

situations.label: Deal is in proposal stage
situations.rationale: The deal has not yet been confirmed as won in the State System fixture set.

goals: Keep operational handoff separate from marketing opportunity.
Avoid external claims until relationship sensitivity and approval are clear.
blockers: No won-stage evidence is recorded yet.
No public announcement permission is recorded.
open_questions: Has the deal moved to won?
What delivery or onboarding follow-up is required?
Can Southern Abrasives be named publicly?

next_actions.summary: Confirm Southern Abrasives deal stage and operational handoff needs.
